7d6425977220.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
7d6425977220.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
7d6425977220.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

81fa7c1ac630.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
81fa7c1ac630.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

b89087c01aff.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
b89087c01aff.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
b89087c01aff.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

7f7a7d7bdfa3.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
7f7a7d7bdfa3.description: At 176 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
